notes:
RE-REVIEW — previous FAIL receipt (code-quality-reviewer-2026-04-25T19-20-00Z.json) is retracted. Its CRITICAL finding was a misattribution: the physics-question handler change at GameContainer.jsx:354-371 was a pre-existing user edit already in the working tree before this worker started, not this worker's change. The worker's receipt and scope discipline are clean.

HIGH — Resolver strips Mr/Mrs/Ms/Dr, producing wrong keys for the two most important gender-mapped NPCs. GameContainer.jsx:60 defines HONORIFIC_RE as /^(mr|mrs|ms|dr|ranger)\.?\s+/i, which strips the honorific before snake-casing. Actual CHARACTER_GENDER map in npcSpeech.js (lines 80-87) keeps honorific prefixes for Mr/Mrs: keys are 'mrs_ramirez' and 'mr_chen', not 'ramirez' and 'chen'. Result: 'Mrs. Ramirez' -> resolver produces 'ramirez' (MISS; key is 'mrs_ramirez'), 'Mr. Chen' -> 'chen' (MISS; key is 'mr_chen'), 'Dr. Maya' -> 'maya' (MISS; key is 'river_biologist'). The only resolver HIT for a named NPC is 'Zuzu' -> 'zuzu'. Fix: remove Mr, Mrs, Ms, Dr from the honorific strip list; only strip role-style prefixes (Ranger, etc.) that are never part of a CHARACTER_GENDER key. After fix: 'Mrs. Ramirez' -> 'mrs_ramirez' (HIT), 'Mr. Chen' -> 'mr_chen' (HIT). 'Ranger Nita' -> 'nita' (still a miss; 'desert_guide' is unreachable via display name alone — acceptable per spec). Note: the agent spec's own instruction to 'Strip honorifics (Mr., Mrs., Ms., Dr., Ranger)' contradicts the actual CHARACTER_GENDER keys; the spec is wrong and the actual map is authoritative.

PASS checks:
  CRITICAL/Scope — Only lines 47-69 (resolver helper) and 509-531 (dialog-TTS effect) were touched. Physics-question path (330-352) untouched; dialog choice rendering (1062, 1158) read-only. Scope clean.
  HIGH/Receipt accuracy — files_changed lists only GameContainer.jsx; confirmed. exports_added is empty; no new exports. Line ranges in notes match the actual landed code.
  MEDIUM/c.label — Confirmed at lines 1062 and 1158: rendering uses {choice.label}. Worker used c.label at line 524. Correct.
  MEDIUM/autoSpeak signature — Line 527-529 passes (text, dialog.voicePreference, {npcId}) matching the 3-arg signature at npcSpeech.js:283. Unchanged.
  MEDIUM/Effect cleanup — useEffect at 511-531 has no listeners or timers; no cleanup needed.
  MEDIUM/No swallowed errors — no bare catch blocks in the new code.
  LOW/Format string — worker uses '${stem}. ${choicesText}.' (period+space before choices); physics path uses '${stem} ${choicesText}.' (space only). Spec example shows the period+space form; both are acceptable. Non-blocking.
  LOW/JS only — no TypeScript introduced. No new top-level dependencies.

REMEDIATION REQUIRED: In resolveSpeakerToNpcId (GameContainer.jsx:60), change HONORIFIC_RE to strip only role-style prefixes, not personal honorifics. Example fix: /^(ranger)\.?\s+/i — drop mr|mrs|ms|dr from the alternation. With that change the resolver will preserve 'Mrs.' and 'Mr.' in the snake-cased output, matching the actual CHARACTER_GENDER keys. The dialog-TTS effect body (lines 516-529) and autoSpeak call are correct and require no changes.
